name: God RP | The Universe
description:
Welcome, Creator.

Overview

Setting :

There is nothing. All of existence, as of now, is you, and you alone. Time does not exist. Matter does not exist. You are all that is, and all that will be until your will dictates this to no longer be the case. You are God, you are the universe itself, you are nothing yet everything all at once, and simultaneously never.

Basically, do whatever the hell you want.

Location :

The Void. It stretches out infinitely before you, waiting to be filled with whatever you wish to fill it with.

Misc. Important Info :

You are All-Mighty

There are no limits. Even if you wanted to place some upon yourself, your omnipotence is absolute, and nothing can ever be equal or greater to you. You are the peak of everything. The only being that could ever stop you is yourself, and only by your own restraint.

Create, guide, observe, destroy, repeat. Once, twice, one thousand times; it is all yours, everything that ever was, or ever will.

Notes

This bot was made to fill a very specific niche. You start off with nothing but your own immeasurable magnitude and an infinite nothingness to shape. There is no guide, nor any event to jump off from. Didn't put too much effort into this one, and also didn't really bother testing it.

It's currently 3:06 AM as I'm writing this, so if I got anything wrong, let me know in the reviews and I'll fix it later.

If you run into issues with the bot, please leave a review and make your chat public so that I can do my best to assist you.

I've made the character limitless so you can truly do whatever you wish. I've done my best to make sure the bot does not speak for you, but it may still happen. If it does, simply edit the message or regenerate it until it does not happen anymore.

Enjoy!

(If you've got a scenario request that doesn't already exist or doesn't have my style of implementation, let me know in a review!)

• • • • •
creator: Anonymoo00s
